## Officio Assassinorum

![r/Warhammer40k - Can you make an army out of the Officio Assassinorum? If so, what would be a good baseline set up for them be?][image1]

### Officio Assassinorum Special Rules

**Execution Force.** Your Warband does not have a leader. Instead, you must include at least one Elite model, and whenever an effect specifies your warband leader, you must choose any one of your Elite models for it to affect.

**Assassination Targets.** At the start of each battle, secretly choose one of your Elite models and one of your opponent’s Elite models. If your chosen Elite model takes their chosen Elite model Out of Action during that battle, your chosen model earns 1 additional XP. If it does not, your chosen model earns 1 fewer XP from that battle.

### Officio Assassinorum Patrons

Your patron must be the Grand Master of Assassins.

#### Patron: Grand Master of Assassins

*Or a similar high-ranking member of the Officio Assasinorum.*

* **Ensnaring Traps.** Whenever an enemy model successfully Charges this model, that enemy suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.  
* **Extremis Sanction: Melee.** All melee attacks this model makes need 1 less BLOOD MARKER to cause a Bloodbath.  
* **Extremis Sanction: Ranged.** All ranged attacks this model makes need 1 less BLOOD MARKER to cause a Bloodbath.  
* **Perfect Reflexes: Pounce.** Once during each Turn, when an enemy ends its movement within 6” of this model, this model may immediately Charge that enemy.  
* **Perfect Reflexes: Snapshot.** Once during each Turn, when an enemy ends its movement within 6” of this model, this model may immediately make a single ranged attack against that enemy, if it is otherwise able to do so.  
* **Will-Sapping Salvo.** Whenever this model hits with a ranged attack, the target also suffers a STUN MARKER.

### Officio Assassinorum Unique Battlekit

#### Officio Assassinorum Melee Weapons

* **Hookfang.** Melee, GAS, INFECTION MARKERS (including from GAS Keyword), MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Neuro Gauntlet.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, STUN, causes 2 additional STUN MARKERS instead of 1 due to the STUN Keyword, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Nemesii Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
* **Phase Sword.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL  
* **Sympatic Dataspike.** Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, STUN

#### Officio Assassinorum Ranged Weapons

* **Exitus Rifle.** 48”, \+1 DICE, Ignores \-DICE to Injury Rolls, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, TWO-HANDED, Scope  
* **Exitus Pistol.** 12” or Melee (always uses Ranged skill), Ignores \-DICE to Injury Rolls, ASSAULT, CRITICAL, PISTOL, Scope  
* **Needlespine Blaster.** 12”, PISTOL, when used to make a ranged attack, the wielder can make one attack with each profile below  
  * Spine: GAS  
  * Bolt: Scores a Critical Hit on any roll of 11 or higher, CRITICAL  
* **Neural Shredder.** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, ASSAULT, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Toxin Ejector.** 8”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, GAS, TWO-HANDED

#### Officio Assassinorum Thrown Weapons

* **Poison Globes.** 8”, IGNORE ARMOUR, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, GAS, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, THROWN  
* **Psyk-Out Grenades.** 8”, IGNORE ARMOUR, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, PSYCHIC, ASSAULT, STUN, THROWN

#### Officio Assassinorum Armour

* **Synskin Bodyglove.** \-1 Armour, IMPERVIOUS

#### Officio Assassinorum Equipment

* **Sentinel Array.** The equipped model can declare a Charge against an enemy it cannot see.  
* **Spy Mask.** This model ignores penalties for attacking at Long Range.

### Officio Assassinorum Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Death Card (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Once during each battle, when this model takes an enemy Out of Action with a melee attack, place a Death Card marker at that enemy’s location. Enemy models within 3” of a Death Card marker have \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls. Models that are unaffected by the FEAR Keyword ignore this effect.  
* **Decoy Clones (8 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** When this model is hit by an attack, you can make a Success Roll to cause that attack to miss instead. Once this Success Roll succeeds twice, it cannot be used again during this battle.  
* **Digital Laser (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 6”, PISTOL, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Esoteric Explosives (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, FIRE, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL, THROWN  
* **Hyperstimms (4 Glory, LIMIT: 2).** Once during each battle, as an Action that requires no roll, this model can gain \+3” to its movement speed and \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks until the end of its Activation.  
* **Intraneural Biotech (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** When an enemy Charges this model, if this model has not Activated this Turn, it can immediately take the Fight Action against that enemy before it takes any further actions. This can be done only once per Turn, and this model counts as having already taken the Fight Action during its Activation this Turn.  
* **Jet Pack (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** The model gains FLYING and \+2” movement speed.  
* **Micromelta Rounds (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** AMMUNITION (IGNORE ARMOUR). Bolt Sniper Rifle, Exitus Rifle, or Exitus Pistol only. Note that this ammunition does not have CONSUMABLE.  
* **Psyber-Eagle (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 12”, this weapon can be used in addition to any other when taking the Shoot Action. (This bird takes up a ranged hand as normal.)

### Officio Assassinorum Elites

Note that you are still limited to 6 Elite models, even though there are 7 options presented here.

#### 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 120 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Adamus Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Adamus Assassin can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Death’s Artisan.** The Adamus Assassin has \+1 INJURY DICE with any attack it makes against an enemy with the TOUGH Keyword.  
* **Decapitation Strike.** When the Adamus Assassin makes an attack with a Blade, Chain Blade, Chain Glaive, Close Combat Weapon, Eviscerator, Nemesii Blade, Halberd, Paired Blade, Power Weapon, or Two-Handed Blade during its Activation, if it has made no other melee attacks during this Activation, it can grant that attack \+2 INJURY DICE, before rolling to Hit. If it does, its Activation immediately ends after the attack.  
* **Fleet.** The Adamus Assassin has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Adamus Assassin have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, ELITE, INFILTRATOR, LEADER, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 120 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Callidus Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Callidus Assassin can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Acrobatic Escape.** Enemy models never get free attacks against the Callidus Assassin when it Retreats, and the Callidus Assassin can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.  
* **Fleet.** The Callidus Assassin has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Callidus Assassin have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, DEEP STRIKE, LEADER, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 150 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Culexus Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Culexus Assassin is always equipped with its Animus Speculum, Life-Draining Touch, and a Combat Helmet, included in its cost and that cannot be removed. It can be equipped with any other Grenades, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

* **Animus Speculum.** 18”, \+2 INJURY DICE, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword  
* **Life-Draining Touch.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC. If this attack causes any BLOOD MARKERS or takes the target Out of Action, remove one BLOOD MARKER from the attacker.  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Abomination.** Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC or IGNORE ARMOUR Keyword have \-1 INJURY DICE against the Culexus Assassin.  
* **Fleet.** The Culexus Assassin has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Culexus Assassin have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, ELITE, FEAR, DEEP STRIKE, LEADER, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 120 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Eversor Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Eversor Assassin can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Deadly Demise.** When the Eversor Assassin is taken Out of Action, each other model, enemy and friendly, within 3” must roll on the Injury table. Models that are in cover roll this injury with \-1 DICE.  
* **Fleet.** The Eversor Assassin has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Frenzon.** When the Eversor Assassin Charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to its charge move.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Eversor Assassin have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Overkill.** Once during each of its Activations, when the Eversor Assassin takes an enemy Out of Action or knocks it Down with a melee attack, the assassin can immediately move up to its movement speed, and can enter close combat as if Charging during this movement. If it is then within 1” of another enemy, it can make an additional melee attack against that enemy.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, ELITE, FEAR, INFILTRATOR, LEADER, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 120 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Vanus Infocyte | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Vanus Infocyte is equipped with an Augury Scanner, which does not count towards the normal limit, included in its price. It can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Ambidextrous.** The Vanus Infocyte ignores penalties for making off-hand attacks, and has the following benefits while armed with Ranged Weapons with the PISTOL Keyword:  
  * If it is armed with two weapons with the PISTOL Keyword, it can make a Ranged Attack with one and then immediately make a second Ranged Attack with the other. It can use one of the Weapons (but not both) to make a Melee Attack during that same Activation.  
  * Add the ASSAULT Keyword to any weapons it wields that have the PISTOL Keyword (unless they have it already).  
* **Autotomic Servo-Limbs.** Enemy models never get free attacks against the Vanus Infocyte when it Retreats, and the Vanus Infocyte can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.  
* **Fleet.** The Vanus Infocyte has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Vanus Infocyte have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Noospheric Interloper.** After you activate the Vanus Infocyte, you decide the next 3 models to activate, following the normal limits (i.e. the second will usually be your own model again). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, ELITE, INFILTRATOR, LEADER, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 120 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Venenum Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Venenum Assassin can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Fleet.** The Venenum Assassin has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Adamus Assassin have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Unnatural Conditioning.** Instead of gaining an INFECTION MARKER at the start of the Venenum Assassin’s Activation if it already has one, instead remove one INFECTION MARKER from it.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, INFILTRATOR, LEADER, NEGATE GAS, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 120 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Vindicare Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Vindicare Assassin can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Officio Assasinorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Deadshot.** The Vindicare Assassin has IGNORE COVER when making ranged attacks.  
* **Fleet.** The Vindicare Assassin has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Lightning Reflexes.** Attacks made against the Vindicare Assassin have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Keywords**  
ASSASSINORUM, ELITE, INFILTRATOR, LEADER, STEALTH, TOUGH

### Officio Assassinorum Mercenaries

You can hire the following mercenaries

#### Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

* 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Priest (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Vindictor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sister of Silence (Cost: 4 Glory)

* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)

* 0-1 Penal Legionnaire (Cost: 3 Glory)

* 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory)
